chunks.text: Course: EE C128 | EECS at UC Berkeley EE C128. Feedback Control Systems Catalog Description: Analysis and synthesis of linear feedback control systems in transform and time domains. Control system design by root locus, frequency response, and state space methods. Applications to electro-mechanical and mechatronics systems. Units: 4 Also Offered As: MECENG C134, ELENG C128 Related Areas: Control, Intelligent Systems, and Robotics (CIR) Prerequisites: EE 16A and either ME 132 or EE 120. Formats: Fall: 3.0 hours of lecture, 1.0 hours of discussion, and 3.0 hours of laboratory per week Spring: 3.0 hours of lecture, 1.0 hours of discussion, and 3.0 hours of laboratory per week Grading Basis: Student Option Final Exam Status: Yes Links: EECS Course Archives (CalNet authentication required) CS enrollment policies EE enrollment policies HKN course maps
